name: panicdna-claude-busy-indicator
description: A Claude Code marketplace of desktop busy indicators. Choose a glanceable mpv video window (busy-indicator) or a transparent pixel-art animal overlay (animal-busy-indicator). Each plugin bundles its own install/uninstall skills.

plugins.name: busy-indicator
plugins.description: Desktop video busy indicator for Claude Code on WSL2/WSLg. Bundles the 'install-busy-indicator' and 'uninstall-busy-indicator' skills.

plugins.name: animal-busy-indicator
plugins.description: Transparent pixel-art animal overlay (cat/dog/fox/rabbit) that runs across a screen edge while Claude works. Interactive install asks character/position/size/speed/theme. Bundles 'install-animal-busy-indicator' and 'uninstall-animal-busy-indicator'.
